changes.detail: All five mandatory fields present: work_id=D-4, branch=feature/wave1-domain-refinement, risk_level=HIGH, execution_model=TWO_PHASE_START_FINISH, change_type=BEHAVIOUR.

headline_cv(band) at lines 64-71, headline_met(band) at lines 74-81, headline_liv(band) at lines 84-91 — all accept only band:str. confidence_sentence_for(tier, domain) at lines 94-131. D-3 governed next_step constants at lines 306-317. Per-domain next_step functions at lines 366-408.

cv_block() at lines 352-396, met_block() at lines 398-443, liv_block() at lines 445-505. headline_sentence=headline_cv(band) at line 388, headline_met(band) at line 435, headline_liv(band) at line 491 (inferred). caveat_flags=['enzyme_limited_assessment','hepatic_burden_uses_key_hepatic_not_liver_scoring_rail'] at line 470.

Raw caveat_flags rendered at lines 134-138: {d.caveat_flags.join(' · ')} in amber box visible to all users. Collapsed card shows contributor_sentence truncated at 140 chars as CardDescription (lines 66-70). headline_sentence rendered at line 85. No dedicated evidence anchor rendered in collapsed state.
ConsumerDomainScoreV1 interface at lines 278-297. caveat_flags: string[] at line 289. No evidence_anchor_sentence field. AnalysisResult.consumer_domain_scores at line 325.

ConsumerDomainScoreV1 at lines 166-234. extra='forbid' at line 173. Current sentence fields: headline_sentence(215), contributor_sentence(219), confidence_sentence(223), consequence_sentence(227), next_step_sentence(231). No evidence_anchor_sentence or similar field. Any new field requires explicit Pydantic declaration — model will reject it at runtime otherwise.

headline_cv(band='stable') returns 'Your cardiovascular health looks broadly stable based on your current results.' unconditionally (line 68). Band='stable' is emitted for any score 65-79 regardless of active signal context. Active signals and IDL evidence are NOT passed to headline_cv(). UAT mismatch confirmed: 'broadly stable' can appear simultaneously with homocysteine/inflammation-led contributor and active-risk consequence sentences.

headline_met(band='stable') returns 'Your blood sugar control looks broadly stable based on your current results.' unconditionally (line 78). Same structural defect as UAT #1. UAT mismatch confirmed: 'broadly stable' can appear with glycaemic strain / impaired handling contributor language.

Internal engineering tokens 'enzyme_limited_assessment' and 'hepatic_burden_uses_key_hepatic_not_liver_scoring_rail' populated at assembler line 470 as caveat_flags. Wave1DomainCards.tsx:134-138 renders {d.caveat_flags.join(' · ')} raw in amber box visible to all users. Internal leakage confirmed. Fix can be: (a) backend — stop populating raw tokens in caveat_flags, store internal truth elsewhere if needed; (b) frontend — suppress or translate. Preferred: suppress at frontend (no backend contract change) unless internal truth removal is also warranted. Do not expose internal implementation strings to users in any form.

Collapsed card shows contributor_sentence truncated to 140 chars as CardDescription — no dedicated evidence anchor. ConsumerDomainScoreV1 schema has extra='forbid' — new fields will cause validation errors unless explicitly declared in Pydantic model. PREFERRED PATH: refine contributor_sentence to be more evidence-anchored in assembly (no schema change). ALTERNATIVE: add evidence_anchor_sentence field to results.py:166-234 — requires results.py added to scope. Cursor must choose and report which path is used.

confidence_sentence_for(tier, 'cv') emits lipid-completeness framing at all tiers (e.g. line 103: 'core lipid markers are present') regardless of whether _ID_VASCULAR (hcy/inflammation) or _ID_LIPID is the primary story driver. When cv_contributor() returns a vascular/hcy subtitle but confidence sentence references lipid markers, the card tells two different stories. Fix requires passing primary IDL selection or active signal context to confidence_sentence_for, or adding a bridging sentence variant for the vascular/hcy-led path.

D-3 gate PASSED and audit recommended run_work_package.py finish. However work_package_active.json still shows D-3 STARTED — finish has not been executed. D-4 Stage 3 (kernel start) cannot proceed until D-3 token is cleared. Cursor must: (1) confirm on feature/wave1-domain-cards; (2) run python backend/scripts/run_work_package.py finish for D-3; (3) verify work_package_active.json is removed/cleared; (4) then proceed with D-4 branch creation and Stage 3.

changes.citation: git branch -a: feature/wave1-domain-refinement does not exist; feature/wave1-domain-cards exists
changes.detail: D-4 target branch feature/wave1-domain-refinement does not yet exist. Must be created from feature/wave1-domain-cards (D-3 branch) — NOT from main. If created from main, D-3 backend (domain_narrative_wave1.py, domain_score_assembler.py) and frontend (Wave1DomainCards.tsx, analysis.ts) changes will be absent and precondition check will fail.
Clinician PDF paths, backend/ssot/, pricing/trends/actions/upload flows, Phase 2 domains, run_work_package.py, golden_gate_local.py not in scope.

changes.citation: backend/core/models/results.py:173 (extra='forbid'); automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md:214-225 (scope list does not include results.py)
changes.detail: If evidence anchor (req D) is implemented as a new ConsumerDomainScoreV1 field: results.py extra='forbid' at line 173 means any undeclared field causes validation errors at runtime. results.py is NOT in the D-4 scope list. Cursor must prefer refining contributor_sentence (no schema change). If new field is truly required: explicitly add results.py to scope, update Pydantic model, update TypeScript interface in analysis.ts, and report the schema extension in finish report.

headline_cv(band) and headline_met(band) take only band:str. Extending for signal-context requires new parameters. Cursor must grep all callers (including test files) before changing signatures to avoid breaking positional callers. Call sites in domain_score_assembler.py:388,435 must be updated to pass signal context.

confidence_sentence_for() maps unknown tiers to 'medium' at line 95. This deferred D-2/D-3 issue remains unresolved. D-4 may touch confidence_sentence_for() for story alignment (req B). Cursor must NOT resolve the deferred tier-collapse issue unless it is the minimum required fix for UAT acceptance criterion. Report explicitly if touched.
missing_marker_ids displayed as font-mono raw biomarker ID strings. Not a flagged UAT issue. Cursor must NOT widen scope to change this rendering.

advisory_notes: BLOCKER: Run python backend/scripts/run_work_package.py finish on feature/wave1-domain-cards for D-3 BEFORE starting D-4. Token must be cleared first.
BRANCH BASE: Create feature/wave1-domain-refinement from feature/wave1-domain-cards, not from main.

HEADLINE FIX — NARROW: Change headline_cv() and headline_met() to accept signal context. Do not touch _band_label_from_0_100() or numeric scoring. Grep all callers before changing function signatures.
CAVEAT LEAKAGE — PREFERRED: Suppress raw caveat_flags rendering in Wave1DomainCards.tsx. Do not expose snake_case/engineering tokens to users.
EVIDENCE ANCHOR — NARROW PATH FIRST: Refine contributor_sentence to be more evidence-anchored before attempting a new schema field. If a new field is needed, add results.py explicitly to scope.
SCHEMA CONSTRAINT: ConsumerDomainScoreV1 has extra='forbid' at backend/core/models/results.py:173. Any unregistered field will cause runtime validation errors.
DEFERRED ISSUE: Do not resolve the 4→3 confidence tier collapse (domain_narrative_wave1.py:95) unless it is the minimal fix required for UAT acceptance.
STOP CONDITIONS ARE BINDING: If coherence fix requires broad score recalibration, report and stop. If traceability fix requires large results redesign, report and stop.
